entry.title: psotobverse-utils
entry.content: Claude-only orthogonal workflow layer: thin-verb skills (index, goal, reconcile, deliberate, tidy, reflect, audit-report) and commands (comprehend, coverage, cross-examine, sync-cowork) over a shared robust core; governance hooks (nothing-loose write guard, .env protection, doc hygiene, stop reminder); additive opt-in policy routing (policy_router reminders + comprehension_gate write-gate, driven by the project's .claude/policy/routing.yml; routing is additive, never subtractive); an opt-in meta-learner (SessionStart crash-detect + fast resume + environment probe, UserPromptSubmit signal capture, SessionEnd handoff; activated by .claude/meta-learner.json) and generator/auditor subagents (executor, explorer). /coverage is a recall safety net (decorrelated lens panel, union aggregation) against missing a relevant policy; /comprehend is a restate-before-act gate; /cross-examine is an adversarial review panel. Hooks and subagents run in both Claude Code and Cowork.

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: metate
entry.content: Full development pipeline as Claude Code skills: prep -> build -> review -> smoke -> aftercare -> ship. The implementer (cursor/codex/claude/gemini) is the only writer and its build session is resumed across review rounds. Project specifics live in .metate/profile.yml; the skills are codebase-agnostic.

entry.title: kernel
entry.content: Claude Code learns from itself. KERNEL gives your agent persistent memory (AgentDB), multi-agent orchestration (15 agents, tiered routing), and a scientific experiment engine that proves which rules actually work. Your agent remembers failures across sessions, coordinates parallel work without merge conflicts, and evolves its own methodology through hypothesis testing. 20 skills, 14 commands, auto-adapting project profiles. The plugin stays general-purpose — project-specific session overlays live in the consuming repo's own hooks, not here.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max

Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: driftwave
entry.content: A look-before-you-act coding loop for Claude Code: check what's there, what's asked, and the gap — then do it and verify. Clusters artifacts with H₀ persistent homology (real); the higher 'sheaf'/'H₁' layers are topology-inspired LLM heuristics. Guided by five axioms: NO_AVERAGING, UPWARD_FLOW, WAYPOINT_ROUTING, SHAPE_OVER_COUNT, ADAPTIVE_SCALE.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: dev-loop
entry.content: Eight autonomous agents — PM, QA, Dev, Sweep, Reflect, Ops, Architect, and Director — that run a software-development loop coordinated entirely through ticket state. Five are inward / build-facing; three are OUTWARD agents (conventions §21): Ops watches RUNNING prod over time and files Urgent `incident` Bugs on a confirmed+repeated degradation (anti-flap re-check + dedupe, never auto-rollback); Architect audits whole-codebase technical health on a rotating, SHA-gated dimension and files `tech-debt` Improvements (read-only, never implements); the Director owns DIRECTION — on the optional `service` hub it chairs a cross-agent DISCUSSION BOARD (opens topics, the role-lens agents post per-round perspectives, the Director synthesizes → a decision) and DRAFTS the kind:"roadmap" doc that the OPERATOR publishes, folding optional real-user `signalSources` (PII-safe; graceful no-op without a `director` config; conventions §25). Ops/Architect observe-and-file; the Director coordinates + drafts; none implements, ships, verifies, or auto-applies a structural change (§17 — a structural ask stays a `[director-proposal]` ticket). PM proposes and verifies features from a strategy doc; QA hunts and re-tests bugs; Dev pulls Todo tickets in priority order, implements, self-reviews, ships, and smoke-checks prod (auto-revert on a break) — and can OPTIONALLY split into a two-tier Dev (conventions §21a): a senior-dev (opus) that authors a living per-module design doc and delegates staged child tickets to a junior-dev (sonnet) that implements them, with the senior-dev direct-coding any escalated verify-fail; the split is per-project and opt-in (launcher DEV_SPLIT + PM routing) and the legacy single dev agent stays active so non-split projects are unaffected; Sweep is a lifecycle janitor that fixes tickets falling through the cracks (missing/wrong owner labels, orphaned In Progress); Reflect is a daily retrospective that studies the loop's own behavior and curates the per-operator lessons.md from recurring evidence (drafting, never auto-applying, structural changes). A one-time `init` setup command (not a loop agent) bootstraps a product into the loop with a DETECT → MAP → ASSEMBLE → LOAD flow — it detects the project shape (greenfield / brownfield / adopting; single- or multi-repo), read-only-maps a brownfield codebase into a fixed-heading PM doc-base, runs a greenfield strategy interview when there is no code yet, gathers config (incl. extra repos), provisions Linear labels/project (and one `repo:<name>` label per repo when multi-repo), scaffolds the strategy doc/test env/runtime files, optionally adopts named pre-existing human tickets with per-ticket operator confirmation, and prints a readiness checklist. The loop coordinates one or many repos: tickets target a repo via a `repo:<name>` label, with per-repo build/branch/deploy resolution (single-repo stays 100% unchanged). Every ticket the system touches carries a `dev-loop` label so it never disturbs the human backlog. Coordination runs through a configurable backend — Linear (default) or a machine-local file board (`backend:"local"`) with the same state machine and protocols. Every agent also writes daily/weekly/monthly reports to the data dir and acts on any operator review (点评) of them — distilling the critique into a per-agent lessons.md rule that improves its working method (conventions §22). Reports default to machine-local files; an opt-in reports.sink:"linear" (conventions §23) instead hosts the report body and the 点评 channel in Linear for cloud/remote runtimes (default-off, with §16 guardrails and channel-split review provenance). An OPTIONAL Codex companion (conventions §24, via the codex-plugin-cc plugin + the codex CLI; absent OR disabled OR no codex on PATH ⇒ 100% unchanged) gives the loop an advisory second-model review (Dev Step 5.5 + Architect), native image generation (PM mockups + Dev production assets — the one capability the agents lack), and a one-shot rescue before a fix-exhausted block — all gated per sub-flag, advisory only, and never touching Linear. When a ticket is left human-parked for the operator (blocked+needs-pm+external-prereq), PM pings you out-of-band via an optional Slack/Lark webhook (conventions §9 `notify`; default-off, announced once, secret-safe). The coordination backend is pluggable (conventions §18): Linear (default), a machine-local file board, or — new — a local `service` hub (an MCP system-of-record over node:sqlite, zero native deps; see docs/HUB-ARCHITECTURE.md) that gives the loop real PER-AGENT IDENTITY (every write attributable, not Linear's single shared user), versioned operator-published DOCUMENTS, the §25 DISCUSSION BOARD + Director, an optional poll-based two-way IM CHANNEL (Lark/Slack — the operator chats with the Director; §16-secret-safe, no daemon), and an optional ONE-WAY Linear MIRROR (the hub pushes its tickets to Linear for human visibility; split-brain enforced — Linear is never read back as truth), and is CLI-PORTABLE (the same agents + hub run on a second coding CLI — Codex/opencode — against the same db, gated on a per-CLI identity-propagation test; docs/PORTABILITY.md); opt-in, Linear + Claude Code stay the default.

entry.title: odoo-ai-skills
entry.content: The local-first verification & deploy gate for AI-written Odoo 17/18/19 changes — static indexes suggest; this verifies against the running instance. Read ground truth from the live instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Layer-I enforcement gates turn that evidence into proof: risk-based scenario test generation, dev-vs-prod environment parity, a static anti-pattern validator, enforced privacy redaction, an upgrade/migration harness, a deploy approval gate, a one-command evidence bundle (PR-comment verdict), and a bring-your-own-index claim verifier; plus a local Odoo developer-docs index (Layer J). No SaaS, no seats, no metadata leaves the box. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Domain-specific skills and agents for Odoo development, code review, and more

entry.title: agentic-swarm
entry.content: Run large swarms of parallel Claude Code subagents safely — bounded waves, stall watchdog, resume — plus a local first-run profiler/scaffolder.

entry.title: trvl
entry.content: AI Travel Agent — 1 smart MCP tool plus 66 compatibility aliases for flights, accommodations, hotels (6 providers: Google Hotels + Trivago + Airbnb + Booking.com + Hostelworld + HomeToGo), rental cars, trains, buses, ferries (20 ground providers incl. 8 ferry operators + night-train specialists European Sleeper & Snälltåget), 37 travel hack detectors, award sweet-spot scanning, traveller profile with email history learning, deals, price alerts, and destination intel. Free, no API keys required.

entry.content: Claude Code plugin for AI4comms branded deliverables

entry.title: claude-conductor
entry.content: Orchestration primitives for multi-agent Claude Code workflows — dispatch, audit, loop, and agent registry

entry.title: plur
entry.content: Persistent, local-first shared memory for AI agents. Corrections, preferences, and conventions persist across sessions, tools, and machines — stored as plain YAML on your disk, with zero-cost local search.

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2445 (2026-06-28) — DomainAgent financial-invariant-0 조건부 sonnet Phase 2 enforcement (ADR-042 Amendment 17, CFP-2432 follow-up): Amd16 §결정3 이 예약한 DomainAgent flip 자리를 선결충족 후 채움. DomainAgent sonnet flip 조건 = (4-AND low-stakes) AND (financial-invariant-0 shape) 2-predicate AND — financial-invariant-0 = stakes 4-AND 와 orthogonal 한 financial-correctness 결과접촉 축의 별 predicate(STAKES_FINANCIAL_INVARIANT_ZERO). DomainAgent 가 백테스트 결과 숫자(equity/PnL/position/체결가/universe/파라미터)를 생성·변형·해석하지 않을 때만 financial invariant 해석 표면 0(sonnet cover), 데이터·엔진·전략 접촉 시 opus 보존. 신규 consumer-facing surface — (D1) docs/domain-knowledge/domain/backtesting-discipline/financial-correctness-invariant-catalog.md (11 invariant INV-1~11 + A/B 분류(정적 falsifiable/프로세스·메타데이터) + 7 Sins 1:1 traceability + F1 survivorship 1.4% 정정 + F2 storytelling/outliers 편입, DomainAgent write 권한 경로) + scripts/check-stakes-tier-gating.sh STAKES_FINANCIAL_INVARIANT_ZERO predicate + DomainAgent 분기(2-predicate AND, fail-safe 동형, InfraOpArch 동작 무변경) + tests/scripts/test-check-stakes-tier-gating.sh DomainAgent truth-table D1~D6 + regression + mutation RED 2종(생존 0) + docs/project-config-schema.md + docs/consumer-guide.md §1m-2 story_stakes DomainAgent 확장(conservative_override) + docs/orchestrator-playbook.md §3.0.12a DomainAgent spawn-전 외부 shape 판정 분기(§1 원문 + directive 경로 키워드, §4.1 미존재 닭-달걀 회피) + skills/deputy-mandate/SKILL.md DomainAgent stakes 분기 각주 + docs/domain-knowledge/concept/stakes-gated-model-tier-baseline.md F1 protocol DomainAgent baseline 확장(도메인 invariant 식별 완결성, financial-invariant-zero-evidence: marker). DomainAgent.md frontmatter model:opus 값 무변경(fail-safe default 보존, GATE-1) + conditional 주석 + 본문 mandate 표면 재정의(§결정2 invariant, 순수 model downgrade 금지). 메커니즘 신설 0(opts.model override + 4-AND + clamp + F1 protocol 재사용). lane plugin sibling = codeforge-requirements 0.10.0(DomainAgent mandate 재정의). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-042 Amendment 17) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.43.0 → 6.44.0 MINOR (신규 consumer-facing governance surface = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2439 (2026-06-27) — bootstrap-consumer 워크플로 copy whitelist 구동 전환(초기 onboarding): 고정 7종 배열 → templates/scripts/consumer_applicable_workflows.txt(30 entry) whitelist iterate. 신규 whitelisted 게이트(CFP-2434 placement 등)가 신규 consumer onboarding 에 자동배포. AC-4 degrade=whitelist 부재/parse-0종 시 고정 7종 fallback+WARN+non-abort(ADR-116 never-reduce, 0종 fail-closed 아님). .ps1 parity(AC-7). copy source templates/github-workflows/ 무변경. reconcile(ongoing sync) 워크플로 갭은 분리 follow-up #2440. 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.42.0 → 6.43.0 MINOR (6.42.0=CFP-2432 #2443 병렬 세션 선점 → 6.43.0 회피). marketplace sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2432 (2026-06-27) — Story-shape 조건부 model tier Phase 2 enforcement (ADR-042 Amendment 16): low-stakes 4-AND shape(실자금 없음 ∧ production cutover 없음 ∧ 신규 신뢰경계 없음 ∧ live 외부 API 호출 없음)에서 InfraOperationalArchitectAgent opus→sonnet spawn-time override 발효 guardrail. 신규 consumer-facing surface — (F-7) scripts/check-stakes-tier-gating.sh (4-AND 판정 + max(floor,overlay) clamp 결정론 SSOT, discriminating test 8 truth-table + 3 trust-boundary row RED→GREEN 변별) + (F-3) overlay/hooks/check_bootstrap.py check 11/strict (f) story_stakes overlay down-tier 거부(확장-only schema-gate, ADR-127 §결정6) + docs/project-config-schema.md story_stakes 블록(conservative_override + down-tier 금지) + docs/consumer-guide.md §1m-2 + docs/orchestrator-playbook.md §3.0.12a gating 배선 + skills/deputy-mandate/SKILL.md InfraOpArch row stakes 분기 각주 + (F1) docs/domain-knowledge/concept/stakes-gated-model-tier-baseline.md (sonnet≥opus baseline 측정 4-step + opus 복원 trigger 3-임계, AC-9) + evidence-checks-registry stakes-tier-flip-evidence entry(warning-tier). frontmatter model:opus = fail-safe default(override 누락=opus, 현행 무변경). 메커니즘 신설 0(opts.model override 재사용, ADR-057 §결정4). lane plugin sibling = codeforge-design 0.29.0(InfraOpArch 주석) + codeforge-requirements 0.9.1(ChangeImpact sonnet 비준). 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.41.1 → 6.42.0 MINOR (신규 consumer-facing governance surface = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2433 (2026-06-27) — drift-check codex 매핑 decouple + superpowers 제거 (ADR-037 §A1-2 Amendment 3): scripts/check-codeforge-version-drift.sh 의 PLUGIN_MARKETPLACE 매핑이 marketplace registry name 과 GitHub source repo path 를 conflate 해 codex 엔트리([codex]=openai-codex/marketplace)가 404 repo 를 가리켜 codex 실 drift(installed 1.0.4 < latest 1.0.5)를 silent masking. 정정 = registry-name↔source-repo decouple — MARKETPLACE_REPO override 맵([openai-codex]=openai/codex-plugin-cc) 신설 + marketplace_version() 안에서만 consult(installed_version()/install hint 의 ${mp%/marketplace} cache-key 파생 무손상 = AC-5 codex cache 좌표 openai-codex/codex 보존). superpowers 엔트리([superpowers]=claude-plugins-official/marketplace) 제거(CFP-2249/ADR-122 의존 0 + 실 source .version 부재 → 고쳐도 fetch-failed = 제거 대상). 주석 카운트 정정(11→10 entry, 9→10 plugin = codeforge 9 + codex). ADR-037 §A1-2 Amendment 3 fact-correction(결정 내용 무변경 — codex/superpowers family invariant scope 제외 결정 보존, carrier prose 의 wrong codex repo 매핑 + superpowers 제거 + stale 9-plugin/family-7 count 만 정정). drift script self-test 신설(MARKETPLACE_REPO override resolution + superpowers 부재 + AC-5 cache 무손상 discriminating fixture). 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.40.0 → 6.40.1 PATCH (script behavior 정정 = silent false-negative → 정확 보고, 의도 동작 복원). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2434 (2026-06-27) — placement 게이트 consumer-applicable화 (Epic CFP-2418 deferred 배선 closure): CFP-2422 책임 배치 메타불변식 게이트(responsibility-topology-check.yml, L2 책임→레포) + CFP-2428 marker drift 게이트(responsibility-marker-drift-check.yml, L1 코드→책임) 가 consumer-applicability whitelist(consumer_applicable_workflows.txt) + closure manifest(consumer-scripts.manifest) 에 미등재 → wrapper(단일 repo, repo_topology 부재 → fail-open PASS)에서만 실행 = consumer PR 실작동 0 (목적 미달성). 본 Story 가 그 배포 배선을 닫음 — whitelist += 2 basename + manifest += 4 closure entry(.sh thin wrapper 2 + .py SSOT lib 2, ADR-130 §결정3/5 closure-완전성) + 4 asset chmod 100755(Check 4 exec-bit, .sh/.py 비면제) atomic. 게이트 본체(yml/sh/py) 무변경 — 순수 배포 closure(등재만). fail-open layer 분리(ADR-131 §결정2)로 repo_topology 미주입 consumer 는 공백 PASS layer = 전-consumer 배포 안전. 3-way 일관성 게이트(CFP-2412 whitelist-manifest-3way) 4면 PASS + Check 4 manifest lint PASS 실측. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-083/130/131 직접 적용). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.40.0 → 6.41.0 MINOR (신규 consumer 배포 거버넌스 behavior 추가 = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2426 (2026-06-26) — lane-count SSOT 일관성 게이트 신설 (ADR-060 Amendment 19 §결정 33): canonical 작업레인 수(10, ADR-125 Amendment 1)가 governance 문서 전반에서 단조 유지되는지 grep-기반 mechanical 검출 (warning-tier). 현재-상태 lane-count 단언(N 레인 / N번째 lane / 레인 N개, N≠10) 가 canonical=10 과 어긋나면 FLAG + 5축 allowlist(within-line 이중토큰 / negation / history / path / counterfactual) false-positive 차단. same-file channel-split: live description:/section: 값 = 검출 / date:/source_section:/amendment_log span = 면제. amendment_log span = line-local boolean toggle(enter=헤더 key / exit=dedent·다음 top-level key), multi-line regex 0(ReDoS-safe). check_lane_count_ssot.py Python SSOT(line-by-line ReDoS-safe anchored bounded-quantifier regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow(warning-tier continue-on-error) + self-contained discriminating test(22 fixture + 4 mutation 생존 0). evidence-checks-registry append(warning-tier, 17번째 warning-tier entry lane-count-ssot-consistency) + plugin.json tagline lane-count 8→10 genuine STALE 정정. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-060 Amendment 19 §결정 33 framework entry). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.38.0 → 6.40.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d); 6.39.0 = CFP-2428 #2430 병렬 세션 선점 → 6.40.0 회피). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2428 (2026-06-26) — declared-marker layer(L1 코드→책임) drift 게이트 신설 (Epic CFP-2418 deferred FU, ADR-131 Amendment 1): CFP-2422 메타불변식 게이트(L2 책임→레포)의 sibling layer. 멀티레포 consumer overlay project.yaml 의 repo_topology.responsibility_markers[] 섹션(docs/project-config-schema.md sibling 신설)을 읽어, 선언마커(L1)가 토폴로지(L2 responsibilities[]) 및 파일시스템(L3)과 transitive 일관성을 유지하는지 구조적으로만 대조하는 warning-tier CI gate. join-key = responsibility byte-identical 동일 namespace (L1·L2 묶는 유일 연결고리). drift 3종 (exit 1, continue-on-error 비차단): (a)unmarked(L2 책임 R 이 L1 manifest 에 entry 0 = set-diff topology − markers ≠ ∅) + (b)불일치(repo 지정 marker entry 의 marker.repo ≠ topology.owner_repo[R] = 문자열 동등; repo 미지정 entry 는 비대상 = 역방향 추론 안 함) + (c)stale(marker entry path/glob 이 fs 에 부재 = os.path.exists / glob.glob 0건, offline-first fs-stat gh 0). 역방향 고아(marker 에만 있고 topology 에 없는 R) = ::notice:: 만 (warning 아님, drift 카운트 0). layer 분리 fail-open (ADR-131 §결정2 동형 — ADR-130 fail-closed 와 다른 LAYER): repo_topology 미주입 / applicable!=true / markers 미주입·빈맵 = 정책값 공백 layer = PASS(exit 0, honest ::notice::). 스키마 무효(path/responsibility 키 부재·malformed·yaml 파싱 실패) = exit2(setup-error fail-closed). 기계(구조 대조) vs 사람(의미정합 attestation) 판정 분리 (ADR-131 §결정4 / ADR-119 검사연극 금지 — GitHub CODEOWNERS 동형). MVP invariant: 의미 추론 0 / hard-block 0 / 파일별 어노테이션 0 (polyglot-safe per-repo 구조화 manifest, AC-5). check_responsibility_marker_drift.py Python SSOT(yaml.safe_load + set 비교 = regex-free ReDoS-safe) + thin wrapper(ADR-061) + templates+.github byte-identical workflow(injection-safe pull_request NOT pull_request_target / permissions contents:read) + tests/scripts self-contained discriminating test(16 fixture mutation 생존 0 — unmarked/mismatch/stale/polyglot-glob/reverse-orphan/fail-open 4상태 honest-marker assert/malformed 4종). validate_config.py _is_list_of_marker_entries optional 등록(path/responsibility 필수 + repo 선택 + unknown child key reject). evidence-checks-registry append(warning-tier). disjoint from CFP-2422 (L1 marker vs L2 topology — 같은 부모 repo_topology, 검사 명제 비중첩). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-131 in-file Amendment 1). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.38.0 → 6.39.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2422 (2026-06-26) — cross-repo 책임 배치 메타불변식 게이트 본구현 (Epic CFP-2418 Story 2, enforcement carrier): 멀티레포 consumer overlay project.yaml 의 repo_topology 섹션(S1/CFP-2419 신설) 메타불변식(ADR-131 §결정2)을 구조적 사실로 hard-block 하는 warning-tier CI gate. exit 3-tier: (a)고아(owner_repo well-formed 빈 리스트 0 entry = 주인없는 책임, 메타불변식② → exit 1) + (b)중복소유(동일 responsibility N≥2 owner_repo, 메타불변식③ → exit 1; 동일레포 2회 선언 = 정규화 set dedup 후 단일소유 PASS = 중복선언 ≠ 중복소유) + (c)거친파생(declared 소유레포 집합 ≠ actual 변경레포 집합 = 양방향 차집합 declared\actual / actual\declared 각각 출력 → exit 1; actual_changed_repos = git diff 기반 offline-first gh api 0 또는 --changed-repos sentinel fixture). layer 분리 fail-open (ADR-131 §결정2 verbatim — ADR-130 fail-closed 와 다른 LAYER): repo_topology 미주입 / applicable:false / 빈맵 = 정책값 공백 layer = PASS(exit 0, honest ::notice::). SS-1 경계: owner_repo 키 부재/malformed = exit2(스키마 무효 SETUP, 메타불변식④) / 키 존재+빈 리스트 = exit1(고아). 기계(구조 hard-block) vs 사람(의미정합 attestation) 판정 분리 (ADR-131 §결정4 / ADR-119 검사연극 금지 — GitHub CODEOWNERS 동형). pull_request_target / permissions contents:read) + tests/scripts self-contained discriminating test(16 fixture mutation 생존 0 — orphan/dup/dup-norm/drift 양방향/fail-open 3상태 honest-marker assert/SS-1~4). (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2412 (2026-06-25) — whitelist↔manifest↔templates 3-way 일관성 CI gate 신설 (Epic CFP-2394 Story D, 최종): consumer-applicability 삼각 일관성(whitelist 28 ↔ templates/github-workflows/ ↔ manifest 49 closure) warning-tier CI gate. 방향1(whitelist→templates 실존 전수 miss=FAIL) + 방향2(manifest dep→whitelist subset) + 방향3(whitelist→manifest closure-asset 등재완전성, AM-3 run:-block-aware 추출) + depth-2(hard-exit 데이터 dep). graceful=data-absence 스크립트 EXIT 0(path-filter/on.paths skip 금지=required Pending trap 회피) + entry.title: vibemate

entry.title: coach
entry.content: Self-improving learning system that detects friction signals (corrections, repetitions, tool failures), extracts improvement candidates, and proposes rule/skill updates with explicit approval workflow.

entry.title: vault-mind
entry.content: Learning-first skills for an Obsidian (or any Markdown) knowledge vault: quiz, Feynman, Socratic argument drilling, gap-finding, link-surfacing, grounded Q&A. The AI never writes your notes for you; it makes you think. Run /vault-mind:init once to profile your vault.

entry.title: rules-as-tests
entry.content: Rules-as-Tests: turn any codebase convention into an executable test that fails at the earliest reachable channel. Skills, sub-agents, session hooks + an opt-in command to wire git-hook/CI enforcement into your repo.

entry.title: loopprint
entry.content: Interactive wizard that turns a vague goal into a runnable loop blueprint — durable state, an external verifier, stop conditions, and maker != checker. Decision gate, pattern library, and a generated, self-linted artifact package.

entry.title: rawgentic
entry.content: 11 SDLC workflow skills + 4 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 1 security skill + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, refactoring, adversarial review, documentation, dependency updates, security audits, performance optimization, incident response, test suite creation, security pattern syncing, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entry.title: one-star-risk
entry.content: Re-score audit findings (a diff, a file, a TODO list, or another auditor's output) for App Store one-star-review risk. A judgment LENS, not a detector: it assigns each finding a band with a NAMED, overridable trigger, runs an aggressive skeptic pass that demotes any band it can't defend, and grounds in real competitor reviews via a pluggable provider seam (free App Store RSS default, optional paid Applyra adapter). Reports its grounding tier every run and degrades loudly when ungrounded.

entry.title: sensitive-canary
entry.content: Blocks secrets and PII before they reach the Anthropic API

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: nerd
entry.content: Your overnight research assistant. Runs any falsifiable experiment that produces a measurable number against your codebase — parameter sweeps, single-commit hypothesis tests, model/prompt comparisons — in worktrees while you sleep, and delivers findings with recommendations. Finding the magic numbers you forgot is one mode, not the whole job.

entry.title: contextus

entry.title: my-brain-is-full-crew

entry.content: Governance skills for AI-assisted development: commit enforcement, architecture compliance, security audits, code quality, and humanized prose.

entry.title: spec-drift

entry.title: brain-os

entry.title: piflow

Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entry.title: forsvn
entry.content: FORSVN is a marketing/growth co-working stack for your coding agent — composable skills across research, strategy, content & ads, and measurement that run the full loop: understand the market → decide what to ship → write the copy and campaigns → publish → measure, then compound. One front door (/forsvn) routes any request to the right workflow; every skill writes artifacts the next one reads, so your context compounds the more you work. Critic-gated pipelines with quantitative rubrics and anti-sycophancy checks. (Engineering/build skills live in the separate forsvn-dev package.) Distributed from github.com/hungv47/meta-skills (formerly the forsvn-skills plugin).

SessionStart injects the leader constitution and Stop enforces Plugin evidence.

entry.title: fetch-tw-earnings-call

Free for noncommercial use (PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0); commercial use requires a paid license (see COMMERCIAL-LICENSE.md).

entry.title: fak
entry.content: Adjudicate every tool call like a syscall. fak's MCP server exposes capability-gated adjudication verbs so Claude Code can screen a proposed tool call, run one through the kernel, or quarantine a tool result before it enters context.
